task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N180 development-task-breakdown artifact. The ground truth is at: 开发任务清单.csv (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured

artifacts.开发任务清单.csv:
task_id,task_name,task_kind,task_type,granularity,task_size_tier,size_in_pd,owner_role,definition_of_done,traces_to,depends_on_hint,sprint.target_sprint,sprint.priority_in_sprint,sprint.carry_over_policy,confidence,mode,evidence_profile
